description: Focus Mode / Pomodoro Overhaul: Rebuild components/FocusMode.tsx with Pomodoro countdown (25/5 or custom intervals), a beautiful hand-drawn style SVG illustration (cozy desk/plant that grows), session stats, break reminders, warm earthy color palette (greens/ambers), and ambient sound integration (HTML5 audio with free ambient URLs or embedded Spotify for lo-fi).
steps: 1. Redesign components/FocusMode.tsx from count-up timer to Pomodoro countdown mode. Default: 25 min focus / 5 min break. Allow custom intervals via a settings popover (e.g., 25/5, 50/10, custom).

2. Replace the current breathing guide circle with a beautiful SVG illustration: a cozy desk scene or a plant that visually 'grows' as the Pomodoro progresses (CSS animation or framer-motion to animate SVG paths). Use warm earthy tones (greens, ambers, warm browns).

3. Change the color palette of the focus mode overlay from cold indigo/purple to warm earthy tones: warm greens (#4ade80, #16a34a), ambers (#f59e0b, #d97706), cream backgrounds. The radial gradient behind should use these warm tones.
4. Add session stats display: 'You completed N pomodoros today' - persist pomodoro count in localStorage per day.

5. Add break state: When the 25-min timer ends, auto-transition to 'Break' mode with a 5-min countdown. Show a gentle notification/toast. The UI should visually distinguish between focus and break states (e.g., different accent color, different illustration state).

6. Integrate ambient sounds: Replace the current 'rain/cafe/silence' buttons with actual working audio. Use HTML5 Audio with free ambient sound URLs (freesound.org CC0 rain loops, cafe sounds). Include a volume slider. Audio should play/pause when focus mode starts/stops.
7. Style everything with the matte design language from FEAT-001: no glass effects, warm subtle fills, readable text, no excessive glow.
acceptance_criteria: npm run build passes without errors
Focus mode has a working Pomodoro countdown timer (25/5 default)
A cozy SVG illustration is present and animates with progress
Color palette is warm (greens, ambers) not cold (blue/purple)
Session stats show completed pomodoros count
Break mode auto-triggers after focus period ends
Ambient sound buttons actually trigger audio playback via HTML5 Audio
Volume control exists for ambient sounds
